hero.subtitle: Most projects die because nobody wants them. SparkBin forces you through a 6-stage workflow with AI coaching, so you know if your idea is worth building before you write a single line of code.

stages.label: WORKFLOW
stages.title: 6 Stages: Idea to Monetization
stages.subtitle: Not a todo list. Each stage has strict entry and exit criteria. The AI coach won't let you proceed until you've done the work.

items.label: IDEA
items.desc: Capture inspiration. AI generates a competitive analysis and feasibility report in under 5 minutes.

items.label: VALIDATE
items.desc: GO/NO-GO gate. No validation data? The gate stays closed. Build nothing until demand is proven.

items.label: PROTOTYPE
items.desc: AI drafts your MVP plan, compares tech stacks, and writes launch copy for Twitter, Reddit, and ProductHunt.

items.label: SHIP
items.desc: Launch checklist management. Every critical step must be checked before your product goes live.

items.label: GROW
items.desc: Multi-platform content tracking, A/B test copy, and find out which channel actually brings users.

items.label: MONETIZE
items.desc: Pricing simulator + revenue forecast. Input your price and expected users. AI tells you the payback period.

features.label: FEATURES
features.title: AI Is Not a Chat Box. It's Infrastructure.
features.subtitle: Not "we added an AI button." AI is deeply embedded in every stage. It knows what you should do, where you're stuck, and what to validate next.

items.title: Pixel Pet Coach
items.desc: Every project gets a pixel-art AI pet. It knows what stage you're in. It nags you, encourages you, and roasts you when you procrastinate.

items.title: GO/NO-GO Gates
items.desc: Try to skip validation? Not happening. The AI checks your stage output. If it doesn't meet the criteria, you go back and do the work.

items.title: One-Click Multi-Platform Launch
items.desc: ProductHunt, V2EX, Twitter, Reddit, Xiaohongshu — pick a platform, and the AI generates platform-native launch copy instantly.

items.title: Monetization Simulator
items.desc: Enter your pricing, expected users, and acquisition cost. The AI calculates revenue curves and tells you exactly when you'll break even.

items.title: GitHub One-Click Import
items.desc: Paste a GitHub repo URL. The AI analyzes the README, suggests the right stage, and pre-fills your project fields.

items.title: Local AI (Offline)
items.desc: Connect via Ollama. Zero API costs, zero network dependency, zero data leaving your machine.

deployment.label: DEPLOYMENT
deployment.title: Two Ways to Use. Same Full Experience.
deployment.subtitle: Open source is not a business compromise. It's the foundation of trust.

selfHosted.title: SELF-HOSTED
selfHosted.desc: Fully open source. Your data, your server. Ideal for developers who want full control.
features: Unlimited AI calls (bring your own API key)

cloud.title: SPARKBIN CLOUD
cloud.desc: Zero config, ready to use. Managed AI backend, automatic updates. Focus on building.

pricing.label: PRICING
pricing.title: Self-Hosted Is Free. Cloud Is Pay-As-You-Go.
pricing.subtitle: Have a server? One-command Docker deploy, all features unlocked, zero cost. Don't want to self-host? Cloud version charges by AI usage. Credits never expire.

tiers.name: Pay-as-you-go
tiers.desc: Buy what you need. Credits never expire.

cta.title: Stop Building Things Nobody Wants
cta.subtitle: You spent 3 months building something. Launched it. Zero users. SparkBin prevents that. Use the 6-stage workflow and AI coach to know if your idea is worth building before you write a single line of code.

footer.brand: AI-native project coach for indie hackers.
